title: panicum johnii
intro: Panicum johnii, also known as John's panic grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is commonly found in the tropical and subtropical regions of the world. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Panicum johnii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
